CustomField.description: Net Units are automatically calculated by the system based on the Utilization Usage and the selected Rate Unit. For example, if the Rate Unit is set to Cycles and the utilization for the period is 120 FC, the Net Units will be 120. For a Fixed Rate Unit, the Net Units will default to 1. Although this is system-calculated, the field is editable to allow users to override the value if needed. The final Net Units entered here will update the Total MR and displayed on the invoice.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Net Units are automatically calculated by the system based on the Utilization Usage and the selected Rate Unit. For example, if the Rate Unit is set to Cycles and the utilization for the period is 120 FC, the Net Units will be 120. For a Fixed Rate Unit, the Net Units will default to 1. Although this is system-calculated, the field is editable to allow users to override the value if needed. The final Net Units entered here will update the Total MR and displayed on the invoice.
CustomField.label: Net Units
